title: Create a $5,000 cash buffer goal
reason: Net worth is positive but cash balance is < $1k. A $5k cash buffer covers ~1 month of expenses based on the user's recent spending and reduces forecast risk on the next Tight Month.

proposed_change.name: Cash buffer (1 month expenses)
proposed_change.notes: Ledger auto-tracks current_amount from cash + chequing + savings balances.
